name: atlassian-browser-skills
description: Agent skills to read/write Jira & Confluence through your already-logged-in local browser (Safari/Chrome/Edge) when the Atlassian MCP and API tokens are blocked or unavailable.

plugins.name: atlassian-browser-skills
plugins.description: Read/write Jira & Confluence via your already-logged-in local browser (Safari/Chrome/Edge) when the Atlassian MCP and API tokens are blocked - no API token, no MCP. Includes a macOS skill (osascript to Safari/Chrome) and a Windows skill (Chrome DevTools Protocol).
